examples.title: Algorithm: Base and Limit Register Check
examples.description: Checks if a logical address is within the valid range
examples.code:
ALGORITHM BaseLimitCheck
INPUT: logicalAddress, baseRegister, limitRegister
OUTPUT: validAccess

BEGIN
 physicalAddress = baseRegister + logicalAddress
 IF logicalAddress < limitRegister THEN
 validAccess = TRUE
 ELSE
 validAccess = FALSE
 END IF
 RETURN validAccess
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm takes a logical address, base register, and limit register as input, calculates the physical address, and checks if the logical address is within the valid range.

examples.explanation: This Python function implements the base and limit register check algorithm.
